# Tests --output-htmx-helpers flag generates HTMX response header setters and request header readers
#
# Grep assertions verify all HTMX helper function names exist in generated code.
# Integration tests exercise representative behavior: HXRequest (request reader),
# HXTrigger and HXRetarget (response header setters).

muxt generate --output-htmx-helpers

grep 'func.*HXLocation' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXPushURL' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXRedirect' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXRefresh' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXReplaceURL' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXReswap' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXRetarget' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXReselect' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXTrigger\b' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXTriggerAfterSettle' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXTriggerAfterSwap' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXRequest' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXBoosted' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXCurrentURL' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXHistoryRestoreRequest' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXPrompt' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXTargetElementID' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXTriggerName' template_routes.go
grep 'func.*HXTriggerElementID' template_routes.go

exec go test -v

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.25
-- in.go --
package main

func main() {}
-- template.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed template.gohtml
var templatesDir embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesDir, "template.gohtml"))
-- template.gohtml --
{{define "GET / 200"}}
{{if .HXRequest}}
  <div id="content">HTMX fragment</div>
{{else}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html><body>
  <div id="content">Full page</div>
</body></html>
{{end}}
{{end}}

{{define "POST /trigger 200"}}
{{.HXTrigger "itemCreated"}}
{{.HXRetarget "#item-list"}}
<div>Created</div>
{{end}}
-- template_test.go --
package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func TestFullPage(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/", nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("expected 200, got %d", rec.Code)
	}
	body := rec.Body.String()
	if want := "Full page"; !strings.Contains(body, want) {
		t.Errorf("expected body to contain %q, got %q", want, body)
	}
}

func TestHTMXFragment(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/", nil)
	req.Header.Set("HX-Request", "true")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("expected 200, got %d", rec.Code)
	}
	body := rec.Body.String()
	if want := "HTMX fragment"; !strings.Contains(body, want) {
		t.Errorf("expected body to contain %q, got %q", want, body)
	}
}

func TestHTMXResponseHeaders(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, nil)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/trigger", nil)
	req.Header.Set("HX-Request", "true")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("expected 200, got %d", rec.Code)
	}
	if got := rec.Header().Get("HX-Trigger"); got != "itemCreated" {
		t.Errorf("expected HX-Trigger 'itemCreated', got %q", got)
	}
	if got := rec.Header().Get("HX-Retarget"); got != "#item-list" {
		t.Errorf("expected HX-Retarget '#item-list', got %q", got)
	}
}
